recommendations.title: The Chaos Class Failed the Class
recommendations.overview: A young and beautiful female teacher starts working in an all boys high school.

recommendations.title: The Chaos Class Is Waking Up
recommendations.overview: A sincere and hardworking student joins the Chaos Class, but acceptance seems unlikely when he becomes the target of their pranks.

recommendations.title: Saban, Son of Saban
recommendations.overview: Clumsy soldiers Şaban and Ramazan fall for a singer-dancer and accidentally become secret policemen tracking down a missing diamond.

recommendations.title: The Chaos Class

recommendations.title: The Chaos Class Is on Vacation
recommendations.overview: Lazy, uneducated male students mostly coming from money, share a very close band. They live together in the dormitory of this private highschool, where they daily plan their latest pranks on teachers or the other classes. Because of the financial cri

recommendations.title: Bring Her Back
recommendations.overview: Following the death of their father, a brother and sister are sent to live with a foster mother, only to learn that she is hiding a terrifying secret.

recommendations.title: The Terminal
recommendations.overview: An Eastern European tourist unexpectedly finds himself stranded in JFK airport, and must take up temporary residence there.

recommendations.title: Mohamed Dubois
recommendations.overview: Arnaud Dubois may be the heir to a bank, but he prefers to call himself Mohamed. Having fallen out with his father, he turns his back on the family residence. On his travels, he meets Mustafa, who introduces him to his sister Sabrina. Having fallen i

recommendations.title: Old Men in New Cars: In China They Eat Dogs II
recommendations.overview: The last wish of the dying "Monk" is for his foster child, Harald, to find his real son, Ludvig. But the latter is currently in a Swedish prison cell...

recommendations.title: Get the Grift
recommendations.overview: After a botched scam, Clóvis bumps into Lohane, his estranged foster sister. In a bind, they soon realize the only way out is to band together.
